content: Hey, I'm Hayden Schmidt. I'm a video game streamer and content creator, and I'm trying to balance my work and personal life.
Hi Hayden! It's great that you're prioritizing your well-being. What's a typical day like for you?
I wake up at 9:00 AM, spend some time responding to comments and engaging with my audience, and then start streaming around 12:00 PM. I love playing games and interacting with my viewers.
That sounds like a lot of fun! Streaming can be a great way to connect with others who share your passions. What kind of games do you like to play?
I'm really into multiplayer games like Overwatch and Apex Legends. I love the competitive aspect and the teamwork involved.
Those are both great games! Do you have a favorite team or player that you like to watch or play with?

Yeah, I love watching the Overwatch League. My favorite team is the San Francisco Shock. And, of course, I love playing with my friends and family. My wife and kids are always getting into gaming with me.
That's great! It's wonderful that you have a supportive family who shares your interests. What do you like to do to unwind after a long streaming session?

I'm really into gardening and mushroom foraging. I love getting out into nature and exploring the local flora and fauna. I've been learning about the different species of mushrooms and how to identify them safely.
That's really cool! Gardening and foraging can be such great ways to connect with nature and relax. Do you have a favorite type of mushroom that you like to forage for?
Yeah, I love searching for morel mushrooms. They're so elusive, but it's always a thrill when I find one. And, of course, I love spending time with my kids and watching them learn and grow.
That's wonderful! It's great that you're able to spend quality time with your family and pursue your passions. Do you have any upcoming events or projects that you're excited about?
Actually, I'm thinking of starting a new series on my channel focused on speedcubing. I've been learning how to solve the Rubik's Cube and I'm getting pretty fast.
That's a great idea! Speedcubing is such a unique and interesting skill. I'm sure your audience will love watching you solve the cube and learn new techniques.
Yeah, I'm excited to share my progress and learn from others in the community. And, of course, I'll be continuing to stream and create content for my channel.

That's great! It's wonderful that you're able to pursue your passions and share them with others. It was great chatting with you, Hayden. I hope you have a great day and good luck with your speedcubing series!
You too, thanks for listening! It's been really helpful to talk through my daily routine and goals.

Anytime, Hayden. Remember to take care of yourself and prioritize your well-being, especially with all the demands of streaming and content creation. Have a great day and good luck with your gardening and foraging adventures!
